desc: FCP HSV-hue rotation basis: exact Rec.709 RGB->YCbCr matrix from ProCore PCGetRec709YCbCrMatrix (dlsym).
finding: FCP HSV-hue rotates Cb/Cr in ITS OWN exact Rec.709 YCbCr space (row0=luma matches PCGetGamutColorSpaceLuminanceCoefficients(0) exactly). Rotating (Cb,Cr) by the hue angle in this exact matrix fits 23.7 rms (code) / +gamut-desat 20.7 rms (ws) vs REAL FCP -- best hue model, directionally correct across 5 hues x 7 angles. Residual is the exact GAMUT-MAPPING step (FCP lifts the min channel where hard-clip would hit 0 = desaturates toward luma-gray, but not by the simple ratio I tried). Needs the PAEHSVAdjust/HgcHSVAdjust gamut-clip disasm to close. CONFIRMS: hue is luma-preserving Rec.709 YCbCr rotation, NOT HSV-hextant (shader shape) NOR generic YUV/YIQ.
